title: Blue Low Fire
description: Blue fire with reduced height for maximum PvP visibility.
body:
# ✨ Features

Blue Low Fire: Replaces the default orange fire with a blue flame that matches your Blue Crit & Sweep pack.

Low Vision Overlay: Specifically designed to stay at the bottom of your screen so you can keep track of enemies while burning.

Tactical Advantage: The bright blue stands out against ground textures, making it easier to see where fire has been placed during PvP.


🛠 **Installation**
1. Download the .zip file.
2. Open Minecraft and go to Options > Resource Packs.
3. Drag, drop, and move the file to the Selected side.

# 👤 Credits
Created by **NotGalib**.

📜 **Permissions**
Videos & Modpacks: You are free to include this in any content withcredit to NotGalib.

Re-uploads: Strictly prohibited to ensure users get the correct version.
